### How hard is it to get hired as a AI-Summer Intern at Skyworks?

The interview difficulty is rated 3.9/5 by candidates. 63% report a positive experience. Emphasize Role-relevant depth and Communication in your prep.

### How long does the Skyworks AI-Summer Intern hiring process take?
...
The process typically takes 2–6 weeks from application to final decision, depending on the hiring cycle and team availability.
...
Candidates often report recruiter or hiring-manager screens, role-specific technical depth (often verbal, SQL, or case-style — not a LeetCode marathon for this track), and behavioral interviews. 59% applied online.

With a rich history of work experience, Jackson has had the opportunity to learn and grow in several industries and positions with companies large and small. Jackson has found his passion in business analytics and data science. He is a strong, independent learner who taught himself SQL and Python to take on machine learning projects in addition to his regular coursework as a graduate student at Cal State Fullerton in Information Systems, Business Analytics. He is the former President of the Business and Data Analytics Club, the largest data analytics club in the Cal State system, at CSUF and achieved record breaking attendance at events through strong networking and organizational skills. A few of his achievements include streamlining a quoting process to increase efficiency by 10%, creating and automating several reports to a single button click saving days of work using SQL, VBA, and Alteryx. With a strong business acumen, Jackson is eager and ready to take on any challenge.

results.title: Prabal Bhattacharya
highlights:
I head the global EDA organization at Skyworks Solutions, Inc. My team's focus is to enable the best engineering automation solutions across Skyworks to drive product and business success. Prior to my current role, I led the Enterprise AI organization under the Office of CTO at Analog. My team's focus is to integrate Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI and Machine Learning in a deep and seamless way across Engineering, Manufacturing, Sales and Marketing, and other areas of Analog Devices to improve productivity and transform our customer journey. During my career, I have distinguished myself through my technical and organizational leadership in enterprise-scale semiconductor software development across the breadth of silicon engineering and in building the industry's first true mixed-signal verification system. My leadership roles have included product management, software architecture and development and customer advocacy. In each instance, I have treated our customers as partners and as the final yardstick of success.
...
Head of the Enterprise AI organization, reporting to the Chief AI Officer. I lead a global team of ML engineers, data scientists and software architects to design and develop solutions across the enterprise using Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Generative AI techniques. As part of my role, I collaborate with the executive leadership as well as industry and academia, in developing roadmap, creating financial value model and ensuring solution superiority.
...

results.title: Joshua Lee
highlights:
Software Engineer @ Skyworks
...
MS Applied Data Science @ USC
...
Software Engineer at [Skyworks Solutions, Inc.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/skyworks-solutions-inc)
...
Software Engineer at Skyworks Solutions with a background spanning data engineering, machine learning, and full-stack analytics. I build systems end-to-end, from ML pipelines and signal processing workflows to APIs, data infrastructure, and web platform tooling. My project work includes multi-sensor UAV tracking with Kalman filtering, semiconductor fault detection pipelines, and medical imaging classification systems. I care about writing clean, reproducible code and translating ambiguous technical problems into production-ready solutions. I'm currently pursuing a Master's in Applied Data Science at USC while working full-time, with a long-term focus on ML engineering roles at the intersection of software and intelligent systems, particularly in defense and autonomous systems.
...
End-to-end ML system for semiconductor wafer fault detection on the UCI SECOM dataset (1,567 wafers x 590 sensors, 6.6% failure rate). Designed to help process engineers triage failures and identify root-cause sensors in minutes instead of hours. Modeling – Reproducible pipeline reducing 590 raw sensors to 50 via variance filtering, correlation pruning, and mutual-information selection – Class-weighted Random Forest with 5-fold stratified cross-validation (ROC-AUC 0.747 +/- 0.04, PR-AUC 0.215 +/- 0.03) – F1-optimal decision threshold tuning, doubling fail-recall from 33% to 67% over the default –
...
marked against Isolation Forest and an LSTM Autoencoder; all experiments tracked in MLflow Explainability and analysis – SHAP
...
per-wafer
...
-deviation (
...
each wafer against
...
healthy population – K-means clustering on SHAP signatures to surface distinct
...
visualized with PCA)
...
single + batch
...
, drift, health
...
6-verified
...
card, Makefile for
...
, SHAP,
...
flow, FastAPI, Streamlit, Plotly, Docker, GitHub Actions, pytest
...
Built an explainable deep learning system using CNNs and a medical LLM to analyze chest X-rays and radiology reports for pulmonary edema detection. – Trained VGG16 and ResNet50 models to predict BNP/NT-proBNP biomarker values from 27K+ chest radiographs in a UC San Diego clinical dataset – Fine-tuned the MediPhi medical language model using LoRA to classify pulmonary edema severity from radiology reports – Implemented explainability techniques including Grad-CAM, LIME, SHAP, and image ablation to reveal visual and textual features driving model predictions – Demonstrated that both imaging and language models learn clinically meaningful patterns, improving transparency in AI-assisted medical decision support – Designed and deployed a public project website presenting methods, results, and interactive explainability visualizations Show less
...
WeatherWear is an AI-powered outfit recommendation agent I built as the final project for CSE 150A (Introduction to Artificial Intelligence: Probabilistic Reasoning and Decision-Making) at UC San Diego. The agent fetches real-time weather data for any city in the world, classifies conditions using a Random Forest model trained on historical weather data, and recommends a full outfit — top, bottom, outerwear, footwear, and accessories — with a conversational explanation of why each item was chosen. The web app features smart city search with country detection (typing "Japan" returns Tokyo, Osaka, Kyoto, etc.), geolocation support, native language city names (Tokyo → 東京, Munich → München), a clickable 7-day forecast, dynamic weather-themed backgrounds, and a Celsius/Fahrenheit toggle. A methodology section on the page explains the full decision pipeline so users understand how recommendations are made. Built with Python, FastAPI, scikit-learn, and vanilla HTML/CSS/JS. Deployed on Render. Show less

# Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Experience: 12–15+ Years (Data Science / AI Experience)
...
We are seeking a highly accomplished Lead Data Scientist with strong Generative AI expertise to design and drive enterprise-scale AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have deep experience in machine learning, statistical modeling, Large Language Models (LLMs), and advanced analytics, along with strong leadership capabilities to guide teams and deliver impactful AI-driven products.
...
This role requires ownership of GenAI solution design, model development, experimentation, deployment, and performance optimization across enterprise environments.
...
- Key Responsibilities
- Define and lead GenAI and data science strategy across business use cases.
- Design and implement LLM-based applications including RAG architectures.
- Lead development of machine learning models and advanced analytics solutions.
- Perform deep exploratory data analysis (EDA) and derive actionable insights.
- Architect end-to-end ML pipelines (data ingestion → training → deployment → monitoring).
- Optimize models for accuracy, scalability, and cost efficiency.
- Collaborate with Data Engineers, ML Engineers, and Product stakeholders.
- Establish best practices for MLOps, model governance, and evaluation frameworks.
- Mentor junior data scientists and lead technical decision-making.
- Drive innovation in AI/ML and Generative AI solutions.
...
Required Technical Skills
...
- Data Science & ML
- Strong expertise in Machine Learning & Statistical Modeling
- Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
- Feature engineering, model evaluation, and tuning

- Generative AI
- LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, etc.)
- Prompt engineering and LLM orchestration
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- LangChain / LlamaIndex / Hugging Face

- Data & Processing
- SQL
- Large-scale data handling and transformation

- Cloud & MLOps
- AWS / Azure / GCP
- MLflow / SageMaker / Azure ML
- CI/CD for ML pipelines
- Model deployment and monitoring

- Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with Deep Learning (TensorFlow / PyTorch)
- Exposure to vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Chroma)
- Experience with Databricks or big data platforms
- Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
...
- W2 Full-Time Only
